description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with three horizontal slats forming the sides and a solid base. The wood has a dark brown finish, and the box is reinforced at the corners with visible metal fasteners. Both shorter ends feature cut-out handles for easy carrying, and one end is marked with a bold 'CAUTION' stencil while the other displays the word 'Substance'. The open slat design allows for visibility and ventilation of contents, making it suitable for storing or transporting various items. The box appears sturdy and functional, ideal for use in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or markets.
description: A dark brown wooden storage box with open slat sides, cut-out handles, and stenciled labels on the ends. It is reinforced with metal fasteners and designed for easy carrying and storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing three horizontal wooden slats and the open interior of the box.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden end with a cut-out handle and a bold 'CAUTION' stencil.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with three horizontal slats and an open interior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid end, cut-out handle, and the word 'Substance' stenciled on.
attribute_handle_design: side cut-out handles on both ends
attribute_labeling_or_signage: stenciled labels ('CAUTION' and 'Substance') on end panels
